g.aria-label: X-axis titled 'Decade' for a discrete scale with 11 values: 1850, 1860, 1870, 1880, 1890, ending with 1950
Y-axis titled 'Normalized frequency' for a linear scale with values from 0.000 to 0.030
Symbol legend titled 'Word' for fill color and stroke color with 3 values: candle, steam, telegraph
Title text 'Word frequency trajectories by decade'
